categories.name: TRY Stablecoin
categories.content: A TRY stablecoin is a type of cryptocurrency that is designed to maintain a stable value by being pegged to the Turkish lira.

categories.name: Yoink.fun Launchpad
categories.content: Tokens launched through Yoink (https://yoinkai.fun/), an agentic launch and trading terminal on Robinhood Chain.

categories.name: Strategy Games
categories.content: Strategy game is a video game genre where players engage in planning, resource management, and decision-making to achieve specific objectives.

categories.name: Pump Fund Portfolio
categories.content: Projects and tokens officially backed by Pump Fund, the venture arm of Pump.fun. These projects are selected for their adherence to "build in public" principles, transparent development, and verified founder commitment.

categories.name: Mobile Mining
categories.content: Mobile mining allows users to use a smartphone or mobile device to mine cryptocurrencies.

categories.name: InfoFi
categories.content: InfoFi combines blockchain and AI to monetise and trade attention, influence, and data as assets. It uses decentralised platforms to aggregate, verify, and distribute information, enabling users to be rewarded from their engagement or content.

categories.name: Robinhood Chain Meme
categories.content: Meme coins native to Robinhood Chain.

categories.name: BTCfi Protocol
categories.content: BTCfi Protocol refers to DeFi protocols built on or around the Bitcoin ecosystem. It aims to bring DeFi activities such as lending, borrowing, and yield farming to Bitcoin holders.

categories.name: Hyperunit Ecosystem
categories.content: The HyperUnit Ecosystem includes wrapped tokens like Unit Bitcoin, Unit Ethereum, and Unit Solana, which represent native assets such as BTC, ETH, and SOL bridged into the Hyperliquid platform. These tokens can be traded and used across Hyperliquid’s trading layer (HyperCore) and smart contract layer (HyperEVM) without relying on centralized exchanges or third-party bridges.

categories.name: Animal Racing
categories.content: Animal racing tokens are digital tokens used in virtual animal racing games.

categories.name: SocialFi
categories.content: SocialFi combines social media and DeFi. It aims to bring a more decentralized and user-centric approach to social media platforms, allowing users to monetize their interactions and content directly.

categories.name: OpenServ Ecosystem
categories.content: Tokens launched on OpenServ, a multi-chain crowdfunding platform designed for autonomous startups and Agentic Applications (aApps) built on OpenServ’s AI reasoning infrastructure.

categories.name: Gotchiverse
categories.content: Assets and tokens that are used in Gotchiverse, a metaverse game based on the Aavegotchi project.

categories.name: Liquid Staking
categories.content: Liquid staking is a process in which users can stake their cryptocurrency tokens to earn rewards while maintaining the ability to use or trade those tokens in DeFi applications.

categories.name: Arcade Games
categories.content: Classic-style games with simple mechanics, high replayability, and score-based progression.

categories.name: Launchpad
categories.content: Launchpad is a platform for crypto projects to hold Initial DEX Offerings (IDOs). Participants are able to gain early access to public and special token sales on the platform.

categories.name: daos.fun Ecosystem
categories.content: daos.fun Ecosystem consists of tokens that have active hedge funds on daos.fun.

categories.name: Cat-Themed
categories.content: Meme coins which are inspired by cat.

categories.name: AI Meme
categories.content: Meme coins related or inspired by AI. They either leverage AI-powered agents, are created using AI tools, or derive their concept from AI technologies and trends.
